reviews.comment:
Buen parador en la ruta 2, mucho lugar para estacionar, tiene muchas mesas en el parque para comer algo.

(Translated by Google)
Good rest stop on Route 2, plenty of parking, and lots of tables in the park for eating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJaXJmei1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo y el Punto de parada es estratégico ya que está a mitad de camino a Mar del Plata, el único problema es que hay horarios en que no dan a basto y tardan demasiado para hacerte un café, la atención es buena.

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice and the stopping point is strategic since it is halfway to Mar del Plata. The only problem is that there are times when they cannot cope and it takes too long to make you a coffee. The service is good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJaXR2SWhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion de los empleados .hay bar y lugar de esparcimiento para niños ,todo muy limpio .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the staff. There's a bar and a play area for children, and everything is very clean.
